title: T-004 — Reporting support tables: mv_refresh_log + report_exports + report_access_audits (12-REPORTING §9.2)
prompt:
# T-004 — Reporting support tables (refresh log, exports, access audits)

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §9.2, §11 V-RPT-REFRESH-*, V-RPT-EXPORT-2/3, V-RPT-ACCESS-2/3, §14.1 (BRCGS 7-year retention)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the three support tables that power refresh telemetry, export audit trail, and access-deny audit. These are transactional tables (not MVs), org-scoped, RLS-enforced via `app.current_org_id()` per Wave0. report_exports has GENERATED `retention_until = exported_at + 7 years` per §14.1 BRCGS audit trail.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0081_reporting_support_tables.sql`:
   - `mv_refresh_log (id BIGSERIAL PK, org_id UUID NOT NULL, view_name TEXT NOT NULL, started_at, completed_at, rows_affected BIGINT, duration_ms INTEGER GENERATED, status TEXT CHECK in ('started','completed','failed'), error_message TEXT)` + idx on (view_name, started_at DESC).
   - `report_exports (id UUID PK DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), org_id UUID NOT NULL, site_id UUID, user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), dashboard_id TEXT NOT NULL, report_type TEXT NOT NULL, date_range JSONB NOT NULL, filters JSONB, format TEXT CHECK in ('pdf','csv','xlsx','json'), file_size_bytes BIGINT, sha256_hash TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT CHECK in ('generating','completed','failed') DEFAULT 'generating', error_message TEXT, exported_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), retention_until DATE NOT NULL GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((exported_at + interval '7 years')::date) STORED, archived_to_cold_storage BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false)` + idx (user_id, exported_at DESC) + idx (retention_until WHERE archived_to_cold_storage=false).
   - `report_access_audits (id BIGSERIAL PK, org_id UUID NOT NULL, user_id UUID NOT NULL, dashboard_id TEXT NOT NULL, result TEXT CHECK in ('allow','deny'), deny_reason TEXT, accessed_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), ip_address INET, user_agent TEXT)` + indexes.
2. ENABLE + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY on all three; policies USING/WITH CHECK `org_id = app.current_org_id()`.
3. PRD-mandated rename `tenant_id` → `org_id` per Wave0 v4.3 (decision #1) — DO NOT use `tenant_id` even though PRD §9.2 uses that label (Wave0 decision overrides).
4. Drizzle schema entries in `packages/db/src/schema/reporting-support.ts`.
5. Vitest contract test: (a) all 3 tables exist with RLS+FORCE enabled, (b) cross-org leak test, (c) report_exports.retention_until = exported_at + 7y (DATE), (d) CHECK constraint rejects unknown format/status, (e) duration_ms GENERATED column computes correctly.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0081_reporting_support_tables.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/reporting-support.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify export]
- packages/db/__tests__/reporting-support-tables.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0081 runs, when `\d mv_refresh_log`, `\d report_exports`, `\d report_access_audits` are inspected, then all declared columns/checks/indexes exist; RLS+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY enabled on all 3.
2. Given two orgs insert rows under their respective app.set_org_context sessions, when each queries the tables, then each sees only its own rows (RLS isolation enforced).
3. Given report_exports row is inserted with exported_at=2026-05-14, when retention_until is read, then it equals 2033-05-14 (7-year BRCGS retention per §14.1, GENERATED STORED column).
4. Given a CHECK violation (format='exe'), when INSERT is attempted, then it rolls back with explicit constraint name.
5. Given mv_refresh_log row with started_at and completed_at, when duration_ms is read, then it equals (completed_at - started_at) in ms via GENERATED column.
6. Given pg_policies is inspected, when policies for the 3 tables are listed, then USING/WITH CHECK reference `app.current_org_id()` — never `current_setting('app.tenant_id')` GUC.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: `packages/db/__tests__/reporting-support-tables.test.ts` connects as app_user, sets org context per org, asserts 6 ACs against testcontainers Postgres.
- Run `pnpm --filter db test reporting-support-tables`.
- GREEN: write migration + Drizzle entries.

## Risk red lines
- Do not name the scope column `tenant_id` even though PRD §9.2 uses that label — Wave0 v4.3 mandates `org_id` (NPD T-006 red-flag #7 in audit).
- Do not skip RLS+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.
- Do not omit GENERATED retention_until; BRCGS audit requires immutable 7-year retention enforcement at the DB layer not application layer.
- Do not use `current_setting('app.tenant_id')` GUC; use `app.current_org_id()` foundation function.
- Do not let report_exports.sha256_hash be NULL (V-RPT-EXPORT-2 mandates NOT NULL).

pipeline_inputs.description: Create mv_refresh_log + report_exports + report_access_audits with RLS-FORCE + Wave0 org_id naming + GENERATED 7-year retention + CHECK constraints on format/status.
pipeline_inputs.details: Three transactional support tables (not MVs). PRD §9.2 labels say `tenant_id` but Wave0 v4.3 mandates `org_id` — use org_id everywhere. retention_until is GENERATED STORED so BRCGS auditors cannot tamper post-insert. All policies reference foundation app.current_org_id() function.
out_of_scope: Do not implement export edge function here (T-013)
Do not implement archive cron here (T-013 sibling)
Do not implement scheduled_reports P2 tables here (T-024)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0081 runs, when the 3 tables are inspected, then all declared columns/checks/indexes exist; RLS+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY enabled on all 3
Given report_exports row is inserted with exported_at=2026-05-14, when retention_until is read, then it equals 2033-05-14 (7-year BRCGS per §14.1, GENERATED STORED)
Given two orgs insert rows under their app.set_org_context sessions, when each queries the tables, then each sees only its own rows (RLS isolation)
Given infrastructure and compliance are checked, when verified, then it rolls back with the explicit check constraint name and it equals.
test_strategy: RED: packages/db/__tests__/reporting-support-tables.test.ts connects as app_user, sets org context per org, asserts 6 ACs
risk_red_lines: Do not name the scope column tenant_id even though PRD §9.2 uses that label — Wave0 v4.3 mandates org_id
Do not skip RLS+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY on any of the 3 tables
Do not omit GENERATED retention_until — BRCGS requires immutable 7-year retention at DB layer
Do not use current_setting('app.tenant_id') GUC; use app.current_org_id() foundation function
Do not let report_exports.sha256_hash be NULL (V-RPT-EXPORT-2 mandates NOT NULL)

No raw PII in reports/exports — PII columns (email, phone, address, surname, dob, national_id) must be redacted, hashed, or omitted at the read-model boundary. Consult Foundation T-117 pino redact allowlist for the canonical PII column set.
